JS.title: Introduction to JavaScript
JS.content: JavaScript is a programming language used to make web pages interactive.

JS.title: Variables
JS.content: Variables store data. You can declare them using var, let, or const.

JS.title: Data Types
JS.content: JavaScript has different data types such as strings, numbers, booleans, and objects.

JS.title: Functions
JS.content: Functions are blocks of code that perform a specific task.

JS.title: Events
JS.content: Events allow you to respond to user actions like clicks and typing.

JS.title: DOM Manipulation
JS.content: JavaScript can change HTML content dynamically using the DOM.

JS.title: Conditions
JS.content: Conditions allow decision making using if, else, and switch.

JS.title: Loops
JS.content: Loops repeat code multiple times, such as for and while loops.
